description.value:
Trigger You're struck by a critical hit that deals energy damage or critically fail a saving throw against an effect that deals energy damage.

You're used to taking serious amounts of damage from all kinds of extreme Rodnarth weather, from acid quakes to lightning waves. Attempt a @Check[flat|dc:15]. On a success, the triggering attack becomes a normal hit, or you fail the saving throw against the triggering effect instead of critically failing.
